mapper.select: /* B2bObOrderMapper.xml selectErpB2bObLblInfoList */ SELECT TRN_ID , OBLABELSEQNO , DLV_BOX_NO , DLV_BOX_BCD , WRK_DATE , GI_DATE , BATCH_NO , SHOP_CD , REC_WHS_COD , WHS_COD , EQMT_TYP_CD , GI_ORD_NO , ITM_CD , LOAD_QTY , ITM_PKG_UNIT_CD , FLR_TBL_NO , LOT_NO , DLV_BOX_CTNR_NO , DLV_PLT_CTNR_NO , LCS_RT_FUL_RT_NO FROM TORDER_EAI_B2B_OBLABEL_BATCH WHERE SND_PROC_TYP IN ('N','E','R') AND SND_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY TRN_ID , OBLABELSEQNO , DLV_BOX_NO , DLV_BOX_BCD , WRK_DATE , GI_DATE , BATCH_NO , SHOP_CD , REC_WHS_COD , WHS_COD , EQMT_TYP_CD , GI_ORD_NO , ITM_CD , LOAD_QTY , ITM_PKG_UNIT_CD , FLR_TBL_NO , LOT_NO , DLV_BOX_CTNR_NO , DLV_PLT_CTNR_NO , LCS_RT_FUL_RT_NO ORDER BY OBLABELSEQNO
